description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a pronounced, segmented surface and a vibrant green, curling stem at the top. The front face is intricately carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, featuring two triangular eyes and a wide, jagged mouth with pointed teeth, giving it a mischievous expression. The pumpkin's body is plump and slightly flattened, with deep grooves running vertically from the stem to the base. The back and sides are uncarved, displaying the natural ribbed texture and coloration of the pumpkin. The surface appears matte with a subtle roughness, typical of a real pumpkin's skin. No additional decorative accessories are present, and the interior is implied to be hollow due to the carved facial features.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a green curling stem and a traditional jack-o'-lantern face, featuring triangular eyes and a jagged mouth. The body is ribbed and matte, with no extra decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes and a jagged mouth, and the green stem curling backward.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the uncarved, ribbed surface and the green stem, with the carved face partially visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the uncarved, ribbed pumpkin surface and the full green stem, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the ribbed, uncarved surface and the green stem, with a hint of the carved face on the right edge.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with two triangular eyes and a wide, jagged mouth featuring pointed teeth. The carving is geometric and symmetrical, with no additional motifs or etchings.
